description:
sydney + rich spotify blend

figured out how to set up a spotify blend at greg's kitchen table the prev night, recalling shawn and i had set one up some months before. it mostly alternated between our songs, was surprised to discover everybody wants to rule the world by tears for fears was hers

description:
our parking spot

our hotel was a tall building in downtown cleveland. we got a special parking spot right by the entrance on the ramp up to the garage because our thule scraped the cement block suspended from the chains on the way in. made it real easy to move stuff between the room and the car.
